name: Peak Design Travel Duffle 35L
description: The 35L Travel Duffel from Peak Design has a 100% recycled 600D nylon canvas top and a waterproof 900D bottom.

features.Key Features:: 100% Recycled 600D Nylon Canvas Shell | Padded Hand Straps with Magnetic Clasp | Removable Shoulder Strap | Holds 3 Packing/Photo Cubes | Oversized #10 Weatherproof Zipper | Theft-Deterrent Zipper Pulls | Use Hand Straps to Wear as Backpack | 2 Interior and 4 Exterior Pockets
features.What's in the box?: Peak Design Travel Duffle | Padded Shoulder Strap | 2 x Padded Hand Strap | Limited Lifetime Warranty
